cartToken.title: Cart Token
cartToken.description: The browser cart token from the session ({!@variables.cartToken}).

email.title: Email
email.description: Raw email that was verified by OTP, or the signed-in email.

firstName.title: First Name
firstName.description: The shopper first name if known; optional.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Signed-in email, or the opaque OTP proof returned by verify_code.
